1811930.name: The Death Into Trouble - Wallpapers
1811930.description:
Thank You For Purchasing Our Game!


To show our appreciation for all your great support, we created this Wallpaper Set especially for you to download. We hope you all like it!

Wallpapers


A Set of 7 Wallpapers to enhance your desktop with premium Artwork:
  • 4K (3840 x 2160);
  • Ultra Wide (2560 x 1080);

Accessing The DLC

After downloading The Death Into Trouble - Wallpapers,
you can access the content in the game's directory folder.
Here are the steps to access the files:

  • Open up Steam and go to your Library tab
  • Right click on The Death Into Trouble and select Properties
  • In the Properties window, select Local Files tab and find the "Browse Local Files" button.
  • This will take you to the The Death Into Trouble game directory, which has the "TDIT_Wallpaper_set" folder included in it.
1811930.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
